name: Abu Barza al-Aslami
title: The Protesting Companion
role: Defender of the Ahl al-Bayt in Damascus
shortDescription: An elderly companion of the Prophet who strongly protested Yazid's disrespect towards the severed head of Imam Hussain (AS).
fullStory: Abu Barza al-Aslami was an old and respected companion of the Prophet of Islam (pbuh). When the severed head of Imam Hussain (AS) was brought to Yazid's court in Damascus, Yazid began striking the Imam's blessed lips with a cane. Seeing this heartbreaking scene, Abu Barza could not bear it and shouted: "O Yazid! Take your cane away from those lips! By Allah, I saw the Messenger of Allah (pbuh) kissing these very lips." Enraged, Yazid ordered him to be dragged out of the court.
quoteArabic: ارفع قضيبك عن هاتين الشفتين، فوالله لقد رأيت رسول الله (ص) يقبلهما.
quote: O Yazid! Remove your cane from those lips! I saw the Messenger of Allah (pbuh) kissing them.
